description: Fused softcap CE Triton kernel + warm-start LoRA with TTT weight-decay raised to 2.0 (the key combination — at WD=1.0 fused CE causes TTT divergence on seeds 314/1337). Stacks on PR #1771 base + our PR #1767/#1768 LoRA changes + Polar Express NS (PR #1344) + MIN_LR (PR #1787). 3-seed mean 1.06957 BPB.
methods: Novel (this submission): TTT_WEIGHT_DECAY raised 1.0 -> 2.0. Fused CE introduces tiny numerical differences in training that, combined with warm-start A, push seeds 314/1337 into divergence at WD=1.0 (TTT collapse to ~1.121). WD=2.0 regularizes enough to keep all 3 seeds stable while preserving the warm-start gain.

Fused softcap CE Triton kernel (ported from PR #1787 @nprime06): single streaming kernel computes softcap*tanh + log-sum-exp + per-row CE in fp32, with a backward kernel mirroring the forward symbolically.
Polar Express NS coefficients (ported from PR #1344): 5 per-iteration minimax-optimal Newton-Schulz tuples replace Muon's single fixed (3.4445,-4.775,2.0315) tuple.
MIN_LR=0.10 + GPTQ_RESERVE_SECONDS=0.5 + VAL_LOSS_EVERY=0 (PR #1787): LR floor + reclaim 15s of training budget.
PR #1768 (this author): per-head GatedAttn + gate mirror in LoRA-TTT path + per-row int8 gate quant.
PR #1767 (this author): alpha/rank LoRA scaling, warm-start LoRA A, alpha=144 on rank 128.
Base: dexhunter PR #1626 (Multi-Phase Global SGD + trimmed GPTQ + MATRIX_LR=0.026), samacqua PR #1530 (VarLen + Fused MLP + doc LoRA TTT), bigbag PR #1493 (triple recurrence + parallel residuals).
hardware_note: Trained on RunPod 8xH100 80GB SXM, PyTorch 2.9.1+cu128, FA3, Triton 3.5.1. Identical SP8192 tokenizer and FineWeb docs as upstream HF willdepueoai/parameter-golf.
